==== circularControlFlowNarrowingWithCurrentElement01.tlua (30 errors) ====

    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~

          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      next: A | null = null;
      ~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
              ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                ~~~~

      ~~~~~~~~~~~

!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                                   ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
    }
    
    function getNodes(): A[]
                         ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
      local out: A[] = [];
                 ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
                        
!!! error TLUA1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
      local current: A | null = new A([]);
                     ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
                                    ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
                                      ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
                                       ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
    
      while current ~= null do
        local firstChild = null;
    
        if out.length then
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'length' does not exist on type 'A[]'.
          current = current.next;
          continue;
        end
    
        for i = 0, current.children.length - 1 do
          local child = current.children[i];
    
          if child then
            if not firstChild then
              firstChild = child;
              firstChild.next = current.next;
            end
    
            child.next = current.next;
          end
        end
    
        current = firstChild || current.next;
      end
    
      return out;
    end
